task_objective: Narrow the cache-invalidation review finding to SteamOS/Game Mode scope and implement a Ludusavi config mtime cache marker.
design_decisions: Keep cache invalidation scoped to SteamOS Game Mode and Steam-visible games or shortcuts.
Use a backend-owned Ludusavi config file st_mtime_ns marker to detect config, alias, custom-game, and ignore metadata changes.
Do not treat external backup-status changes as cache invalidators because backup and restore paths validate live Ludusavi state.
Clear pending cache markers on refresh failure so failed refresh attempts do not corrupt later cache metadata.
results: Focused service tests passed after implementation.
